description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 30

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, F, H, XP

You create a body double of another creature, which will act as the original creature would, but will obey your orders without fail. The double has the same ability scores as its original, but its Intelligence, Wisdom and Charisma are reduced to 14 if they were higher than that. It has all of the original's feats, talents, templates, special abilities, class levels, etc.

The double has only half the original's HP and Chakra Pool, and suffers a -5 penalty to attack rolls, saves, Defense and skill checks. It counts as 5 levels lower as the original for any ability or technique whose effects (duration, range, damage, empowering, etc) depend on the user's level. All of these statistics are determined based on the original creature as it was at the time its blood sample was taken.

The double cannot gain experience.
